name: seo-skill
description: Deterministic SEO analysis engine. 98 atomic checks, async multi-page crawler, real CWV via PageSpeed Insights, optional GSC integration for real search data, internal link graph with PageRank, auto-fix generation, audit history with regression detection, and CI/CD integration. Commands: /seo audit, /seo fix, /seo technical, /seo content, /seo schema, /seo geo
